name: housekeep
description: Small Claude Code skills for keeping your dev workflow tidy: todo, do, papercut, audit-permission-requests, setup-housekeep (installs a read-only local-search MCP — ripgrep-backed Grep/Glob with path-allowlist gating, and optionally wires the prefer-dedicated-tools Bash hook and audit-permission-requests log hook), shim (PATH-based CLI shims for gh/kubectl/gsutil/docker that route safe subcommands to the real binary and rebuff unsafe ones to a -real escape hatch, scoped to Claude sessions only via CLAUDE_CODE_EXECPATH), plus the prefer-dedicated-tools hook script itself.
